rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §37.1086, which governs school drill accommodations and emergency operations plan provisions for individuals with disabilities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.1086. RECOMMENDATIONS AND GUIDELINES FOR SCHOOL DRILL ACCOMMODATIONS AND MULTIHAZARD EMERGENCY OPERATIONS PLAN PROVISIONS FOR INDIVIDUALS WITH DISABILITIES OR IMPAIRMENTS.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses school safety accommodations for individuals with disabilities and has no connection to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
